description_long: This object is a shotgun with a streamlined, utilitarian design, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust, full stock. The stock and fore-end are rendered in a matte gray, contrasting with the darker, almost black barrel and receiver. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, with the guard forming a rounded, protective loop beneath the action. The shotgun lacks any visible ribbing or venting on the barrel, and there are no external magazine tubes or pump mechanisms present. The overall form is compact and functional, with clean lines and minimal embellishments. This type of shotgun is commonly seen in urban environments for security, law enforcement, or civilian use.
description: A matte gray and black shotgun with a full stock, long barrel, and a rounded trigger guard, featuring a clean, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the stock, barrel, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the stock, barrel, and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, emphasizing the shotgun's symmetry.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves
